title: Protect places of cultural significance
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Protect places of cultural significance demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Communicate with stakeholders

pcs.text: Develop working relationships with stakeholders that support the management of culturally significant places
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop working relationships with stakeholders that support the management of culturally significant places?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop working relationships with stakeholders that support the management of culturally significant places.

pcs.text: Develop communication approaches that accommodate cultural views and observe cultural protocols
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop communication approaches that accommodate cultural views and observe cultural protocols?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop communication approaches that accommodate cultural views and observe cultural protocols.

pcs.text: Obtain and record views on the way in which the cultural significance and resources can be conserved and used
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain and record views on the way in which the cultural significance and resources can be conserved and used?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain and record views on the way in which the cultural significance and resources can be conserved and used.

pcs.text: Convey views obtained into an organisational and park planning process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Convey views obtained into an organisational and park planning process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Convey views obtained into an organisational and park planning process.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Communicate with stakeholders

elements.title: Conserve significance

pcs.text: Consult with stakeholders to plan ongoing conservation and sustainability actions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with stakeholders to plan ongoing conservation and sustainability actions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with stakeholders to plan ongoing conservation and sustainability actions.

pcs.text: Develop operational activities to implement the conservation and sustainability strategies and plans in a culturally sensitive manner
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop operational activities to implement the conservation and sustainability strategies and plans in a culturally sensitive manner?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop operational activities to implement the conservation and sustainability strategies and plans in a culturally sensitive manner.

pcs.text: Ensure strategies and plans comply with legislation and codes of practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure strategies and plans comply with legislation and codes of practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure strategies and plans comply with legislation and codes of practice.

pcs.text: Make submissions to the organisational budget process to implement conservation and restoration activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Make submissions to the organisational budget process to implement conservation and restoration activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make submissions to the organisational budget process to implement conservation and restoration activities.

pcs.text: Obtain resources for conservation and restoration activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain resources for conservation and restoration activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain resources for conservation and restoration activities.

pcs.text: Organise staff to implement conservation actions that minimise deterioration and damage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Organise staff to implement conservation actions that minimise deterioration and damage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Organise staff to implement conservation actions that minimise deterioration and damage.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Supervise staff during restoration projects?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Supervise staff during restoration projects.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Conserve significance

elements.title: Manage incidents

pcs.text: Develop operational plans to manage incidents consistent with an emergency plan of management and risk management analysis
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop operational plans to manage incidents consistent with an emergency plan of management and risk management analysis?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop operational plans to manage incidents consistent with an emergency plan of management and risk management analysis.

pcs.text: Assign staff responsibilities to manage types of incidents
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assign staff responsibilities to manage types of incidents?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assign staff responsibilities to manage types of incidents.

pcs.text: Obtain and maintain equipment and supplies to enable effective response to incidents
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain and maintain equipment and supplies to enable effective response to incidents?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain and maintain equipment and supplies to enable effective response to incidents.

pcs.text: Train staff in the appropriate response to incidents, that incorporate related work health and safety and environmental sustainability procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Train staff in the appropriate response to incidents, that incorporate related work health and safety and environmental sustainability procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Train staff in the appropriate response to incidents, that incorporate related work health and safety and environmental sustainability procedures.

pcs.text: Make submissions to the organisational budget process to support incident management activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Make submissions to the organisational budget process to support incident management activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make submissions to the organisational budget process to support incident management activities.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Manage incidents

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
